data.title: Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission CEO: Virtual asset roadmap intends to allow pledge and margin lending
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission CEO Leung Fung-yee said at the Consensus Forum that a virtual asset roadmap will be released this afternoon to develop forward-looking strategies by studying the direction of future development. This includes expanding the products and services of licensed virtual asset trading platforms, considering allowing staking, providing derivative products for professional investors, and also considering providing margin lending for certain customers.
Leung Fung-yee said that the current ecosystem development is unbalanced and can now enter the second stage. In this pro-growth strategy, first, Hong Kong will complete the legislation of virtual asset activities; second, it will expand products and services, and is considering allowing staking, providing derivative products for professional investors, and also considering providing margin lending for certain customers.
She continued that the third will optimize the operating process, including hot wallet and cold wallet regulations, and adjust custody requirements and insurance requirements. The content of the compliance review and how to optimize it will be truly maximized to maximize the operating process.

data.title: Matrixport: Huge liquidations in the short term did not cause drastic fluctuations, indicating that the overall leverage level of the market is low
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Matrixport released today's chart, saying that compared with the last bull market, liquidations at that time often caused violent fluctuations. Even if the current market saw a liquidation volume of up to $600 million in Bitcoin and Ethereum in the short term, the price was still able to stabilize at the bottom and did not fall sharply. This shows that the overall leverage level of the market is low, and traders are more cautious and confident when setting stop losses, which may be affected by the SEC's approval of the Bitcoin spot ETF.
Today, the risk of Bitcoin returning to zero has been basically eliminated, and the focus of the market has shifted to its downside. However, historical data shows that the downward pressure brought by liquidations is relatively limited. This is in stark contrast to the high leverage environment during the 2020/2021 bull market.

data.title: President of The ETF Store: Charles Schwab has established a digital asset director position and may provide crypto spot trading services
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Nate Geraci, president of The ETF Store, posted on X: "The leading brokerage firm Schwab has established a new digital asset director position, which is expected to provide spot cryptocurrency trading services."

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Benson: Musk's DOGE has saved about $50 billion and may eventually save several percentage points of GDP
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News - U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessant said Musk's Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) is committed to making the federal government more efficient, and American taxpayers don't have to worry about the security of their personal data.
Bessant said in an interview with Fox News on Tuesday that so far, the DOGE team has identified savings of about $50 billion. "So this is a good start."
He added that the cost-cutting efforts could eventually allow "us to save a few percentage points of GDP."
However, the DOGE team's attempt to access the data of a wide range of taxpayers, including individuals, has raised concerns about privacy issues among Democratic lawmakers. Bessant said American taxpayers "don't need to worry about these things."
According to Bloomberg on Sunday, the team from DOGE is looking for the data but has not yet accessed it.
Bessant said an IRS staff member "is just looking at an outdated IT system, and that's all they do."
Bessant mentioned that two employees in the Treasury Department have "read-only access" to the payment system, which means they have no ability to make any changes. "There are very strict protection measures for them," he said.
Senate Democrats have generally criticized Bessent for a “lack of candor” about the work DOGE staffers are doing on U.S. payment systems.
Last month, the newly formed DOGE gained access to the Treasury Department’s payment systems. This led to the abrupt departure of a senior civilian staffer who tried to block the move. In addition, attorneys general from 19 states and three labor unions have also filed a lawsuit to prevent DOGE from accessing the sensitive system.

data.title: ETH rises above 2700 USDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News OKX market data shows that ETH rose above 2700 USDT and is currently trading at 2705 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 1.48%.

data.title: CoinW appeared at the Consensus Hong Kong Conference, and LALIGA La Liga ambassador Christian Karembeu visited the booth
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On the first day of Consensus Hong Kong Conference 2025, CoinW and La Liga (LALIGA) made a wonderful appearance. As CoinW's newly announced official regional partner of La Liga, French champion team legendary star and global ambassador Christian Karembeu visited the CoinW booth, not only interacted with the audience, but also demonstrated superb skills and accepted an exclusive interview.
In the interview, Karembeu talked about the importance of cryptocurrency in the sports industry, pointing out that digital assets can provide clubs and fans with new revenue models and convenient payment experiences. He said that blockchain is changing the industry landscape, and La Liga hopes to stay at the forefront of technology through partners such as CoinW.

data.title: XRP ETF Expected to Attract Significant Inflows Upon Approval
data.description: According to Odaily, Luca Sorlini, the product head at virtual asset service provider Northstake, has projected that a spot XRP ETF could see inflows of up to $800 million in its first week of trading if approved. Sorlini suggested that the initial inflows would likely range between $400 million and $800 million, influenced by factors such as institutional interest, overall market conditions, and the number of competing XRP ETFs launched simultaneously. Gabe Selby, head of research at crypto index provider CF Benchmarks, echoed this sentiment, predicting that inflows could reach nine figures in the first month. Additionally, a report from JPMorgan in January estimated that the XRP ETF might experience net inflows of $4 billion to $8 billion within the first 6 to 12 months post-launch.

data.title: Binance CEO Richard Teng: AI and Cryptocurrency to Transform Global Economic Sectors
data.description: At Consensus Hong Kong 2025, Binance CEO Richard Teng emphasized the transformative role of AI and cryptocurrency across industries. He highlighted the need for clear regulatory frameworks to accelerate institutional adoption of digital assets.Key Takeaways from Teng’s Speech:Regulatory Progress: The SEC’s past actions significantly impacted the crypto space, but President Trump’s administration has introduced a more favourable policy environment, attracting sovereign fund investments into crypto.Institutional Crypto Adoption: Clearer regulations and advancements in real-world use cases will encourage more institutional players to allocate crypto assets.AI’s Role in Crypto Expansion: AI is expected to broaden the cryptocurrency user base and integrate with all economic sectors, revolutionizing financial markets, trading, and decentralized applications.Support for Innovation: Binance remains committed to working with regulators to ensure that policy frameworks foster innovation while maintaining security and compliance.

data.title: Elon Musk's Social Media Company X Seeks New Funding
data.description: According to PANews, Elon Musk's social media company, X, is reportedly in discussions with investors to raise funds at a valuation of $44 billion. This valuation matches the price Musk paid when he acquired the company in 2022. Following Musk's acquisition and subsequent reforms, which led to a significant departure of users and advertisers, this funding round could mark a pivotal moment for the social media giant. Sources familiar with the matter indicate that negotiations for this new round of funding are ongoing, and details may change. The company may also decide to abandon the fundraising talks. This marks the first known investment round since Musk privatized the social media company. The individuals providing this information requested anonymity due to the private nature of the discussions.

data.title: A whale deposited 23,330 ETH in Binance in the past four days, equivalent to about 61.9 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Spot On Chain monitoring, a certain whale has deposited a net 23,330 ETH (US$61.9 million) into Binance in the past 4 days, with an average price of US$2,654.
